---
title: "Data"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
body-classes: page-data
---

```{=html}
<div class="data-page-container">

    <!-- ── Header ── -->
    <div class="data-header">
        <div class="data-header-title">Data</div>
        <p class="data-header-subtitle">開源資料。透過自動化爬蟲收集與整理。歡迎用於學術研究與個人專案。</p>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Pill Filter Tabs ── -->
    <div class="data-filter-tabs">
        <button class="data-filter-btn active" onclick="filterDataTab('tw-stock', event)">台股資料</button>
        <button class="data-filter-btn" onclick="filterDataTab('macro', event)">總經資料</button>
        <button class="data-filter-btn" onclick="filterDataTab('alt', event)">另類資料</button>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Data Cards Container (Internal Scroll) ── -->
    <div class="data-cards-viewport">

        <!-- ========================================== -->
        <!-- TAB: 台股資料                                -->
        <!-- ========================================== -->
        <div class="data-tab-panel" data-tab="tw-stock">

            <!-- Card 1 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">台股日頻交易數據</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">上市櫃股票的開盤價、最高價、最低價、收盤價、成交量</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>date</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>Date <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>交易日期</td><td><code>2023-10-15</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_id</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>String <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>股票代號</td><td><code>2330</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_name</code></td><td>String</td><td>股票名稱</td><td><code>台積電</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>open</code></td><td>Float</td><td>開盤價</td><td><code>595.00</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>high</code></td><td>Float</td><td>最高價</td><td><code>602.00</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>low</code></td><td>Float</td><td>最低價</td><td><code>590.00</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>close</code></td><td>Float</td><td>收盤價</td><td><code>598.00</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>volume</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>成交量</td><td><code>28530</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">1,250,430</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">2010-01-04 ~ 2026-02-27</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">證券交易所 / 公開資訊觀測站</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋標的</span><span class="data-stat-value">1,732 檔</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~185 MB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 2 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">法人買賣超統計</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">三大法人每日買賣超個股明細（外資、投信、自營商）</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>date</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>Date <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>交易日期</td><td><code>2023-10-15</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_id</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>String <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>股票代號</td><td><code>2330</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>foreign_buy</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>外資買進（張數）</td><td><code>5230</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>foreign_sell</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>外資賣出（張數）</td><td><code>3150</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>trust_buy</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>投信買進（張數）</td><td><code>1820</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>trust_sell</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>投信賣出（張數）</td><td><code>940</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>dealer_buy</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>自營商買進（張數）</td><td><code>780</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>dealer_sell</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>自營商賣出（張數）</td><td><code>620</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">893,210</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">2015-01-05 ~ 2026-02-27</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">證券交易所 / 公開資訊觀測站</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~120 MB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 3 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">營收統計</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">上市櫃公司營收統計（含年增率、累計營收）</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>year_month</code></td><td>String</td><td>年月 (YYYY-MM)</td><td><code>2023-10</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_id</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>String <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>股票代號</td><td><code>2330</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>revenue</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>單月營收（千元）</td><td><code>52480000</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>yoy</code></td><td>Float</td><td>年增率 (%)</td><td><code>12.5</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>mom</code></td><td>Float</td><td>月增率 (%)</td><td><code>-3.2</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>cumulative_revenue</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>累計營收（千元）</td><td><code>315200000</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">326,480</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">2013-01 ~ 2026-02</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">證券交易所 / 公開資訊觀測站</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~42 MB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 4 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">財務報表資料</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">資產負債表、損益表、現金流量表關鍵指標</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_id</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>String <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>股票代號</td><td><code>2330</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>year</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>年度</td><td><code>2024</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>quarter</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>季度 (1~4)</td><td><code>3</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>revenue</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>營業收入（千元）</td><td><code>613143000</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>operating_income</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>營業利益（千元）</td><td><code>287560000</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>net_income</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>稅後淨利（千元）</td><td><code>225480000</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>eps</code></td><td>Float</td><td>每股盈餘</td><td><code>8.72</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">183,920</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">2013-Q1 ~ 2025-Q3</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">證券交易所 / 公開資訊觀測站</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~28 MB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 5 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">信用交易餘額</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">台股每日融資融券餘額與使用率</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>date</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>Date <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>交易日期</td><td><code>2023-10-15</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_id</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>String <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>股票代號</td><td><code>2330</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>margin_buy</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>融資買進（張數）</td><td><code>2340</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>margin_sell</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>融資賣出（張數）</td><td><code>1870</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>margin_balance</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>融資餘額（張數）</td><td><code>48520</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>short_sell</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>融券賣出（張數）</td><td><code>530</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>short_balance</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>融券餘額（張數）</td><td><code>4210</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">756,800</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">2016-01-04 ~ 2026-02-27</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">證券交易所 / 公開資訊觀測站</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~95 MB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div><!-- end tw-stock -->

        <!-- ========================================== -->
        <!-- TAB: 總經資料                                -->
        <!-- ========================================== -->
        <div class="data-tab-panel" data-tab="macro" style="display:none;">

            <!-- Card 1 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">台灣 GDP 與經濟成長率</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">行政院主計總處季度 GDP 統計與經濟成長率</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>year</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>年度</td><td><code>2025</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>quarter</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>季度</td><td><code>2024</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>gdp</code></td><td>Float</td><td>GDP（百萬元）</td><td><code>5468120</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>growth_rate</code></td><td>Float</td><td>經濟成長率 (%)</td><td><code>3.26</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>gdp_per_capita</code></td><td>Float</td><td>人均 GDP（美元）</td><td><code>33140</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">320</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">1951-Q1 ~ 2025-Q4</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">行政院主計總處</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~15 KB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 2 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">消費者物價指數 (CPI)</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">主計總處月度消費者物價指數與年增率</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>year_month</code></td><td>String</td><td>年月 (YYYY-MM)</td><td><code>2023-10</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>cpi</code></td><td>Float</td><td>消費者物價指數</td><td><code>103.72</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>cpi_yoy</code></td><td>Float</td><td>CPI 年增率 (%)</td><td><code>2.15</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>core_cpi</code></td><td>Float</td><td>核心 CPI</td><td><code>102.38</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">960</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">1946-01 ~ 2026-02</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">行政院主計總處</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~28 KB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 3 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">央行利率與貨幣供給</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">重貼現率、M1B、M2 月度統計</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>year_month</code></td><td>String</td><td>年月</td><td><code>2023-10</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>discount_rate</code></td><td>Float</td><td>重貼現率 (%)</td><td><code>1.875</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>m1b</code></td><td>Float</td><td>M1B（百萬元）</td><td><code>241530</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>m2</code></td><td>Float</td><td>M2（百萬元）</td><td><code>568420</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>m1b_yoy</code></td><td>Float</td><td>M1B 年增率 (%)</td><td><code>5.82</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">612</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">1975-01 ~ 2026-02</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">中央銀行</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~18 KB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div><!-- end macro -->

        <!-- ========================================== -->
        <!-- TAB: 另類資料                                -->
        <!-- ========================================== -->
        <div class="data-tab-panel" data-tab="alt" style="display:none;">

            <!-- Card 1 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">股東紀念品清單</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">歷年股東紀念品資料彙整（包含最後買進日、股東會日期）</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>year</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>股東會年度</td><td><code>2024</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_id</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>String <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>股票代號</td><td><code>2330</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>stock_name</code></td><td>String</td><td>公司名稱</td><td><code>台積電</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>gift_name</code></td><td>String</td><td>紀念品名稱</td><td><code>禮券 500 元</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>last_buy_date</code></td><td>Date</td><td>最後買進日</td><td><code>2023-10-15</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>meeting_date</code></td><td>Date</td><td>股東會日期</td><td><code>2023-10-15</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">8,532</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">2018 ~ 2026</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">公開資訊觀測站</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~1.2 MB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 2 -->
            <div class="data-card" onclick="toggleDataCard(this)">
                <div class="data-card-header">
                    <div class="data-card-info">
                        <div class="data-card-name">PTT Stock 板熱度指標</div>
                        <div class="data-card-desc">PTT 股票板文章熱門討論標題與推噓數</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-quick-downloads">
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 CSV" download>CSV</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 JSON" download>JSON</a>
                        <a href="#" class="quick-action-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="下載 Parquet" download>Parquet</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-chevron"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></div>
                </div>
                <div class="data-card-body">
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Schema</div>
                        <table class="data-schema-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>欄位名稱</th><th>型態</th><th>說明</th><th>範例</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr><td><code>date</code> <i class="bi bi-key data-pk-icon" title="Primary Key"></i></td><td>Date <span class="nullability-badge pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span></td><td>發文日期</td><td><code>2023-10-15</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>title</code></td><td>String</td><td>文章標題</td><td><code>[心得] 今天大勢已去</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>author</code></td><td>String</td><td>作者ID</td><td><code>stock_king</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>push_count</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>推文數</td><td><code>87</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>boo_count</code></td><td>Integer</td><td>噓文數</td><td><code>12</code></td></tr>
                                <tr><td><code>url</code></td><td>String</td><td>文章網址</td><td><code>ptt.cc/bbs/Stock/...</code></td></tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="data-card-section">
                        <div class="data-card-section-title">Summary</div>
                        <div class="data-card-stats">
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料筆數</span><span class="data-stat-value">125,340</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">涵蓋期間</span><span class="data-stat-value">2020-01-01 ~ 2026-02-27</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">最後更新</span><span class="data-stat-value">2026-02-28</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">資料來源</span><span class="data-stat-value">PTT 股票板</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat"><span class="data-stat-label">檔案大小</span><span class="data-stat-value">~35 MB</span></div>
                            <div class="data-stat" style="grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: 0.5rem;"><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/" target="_blank" class="colab-link"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> 在 Colab 檢視爬蟲程式碼</a></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div><!-- end alt -->

    </div><!-- end data-cards-viewport -->

    <!-- ── Footer (使用條款) ── -->
    <div class="data-footer">
        <span>✅ 免費提供學術研究與個人使用，嚴禁商業用途。</span>
        <span>發現資料錯誤？歡迎建立 <a href="https://github.com" target="_blank">GitHub Issue</a> 回報。</span>
    </div>

</div><!-- end data-page-container -->

<script>
function filterDataTab(tabName, event) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.data-filter-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
    event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');

    document.querySelectorAll('.data-card.expanded').forEach(card => card.classList.remove('expanded'));

    document.querySelectorAll('.data-tab-panel').forEach(panel => {
        panel.style.display = panel.getAttribute('data-tab') === tabName ? '' : 'none';
    });
}

function toggleDataCard(card) {
    const parent = card.closest('.data-tab-panel');
    parent.querySelectorAll('.data-card.expanded').forEach(other => {
        if (other !== card) other.classList.remove('expanded');
    });
    card.classList.toggle('expanded');
}
</script>
```
